summary: The South Bay's funding spree continues unabated: Nexthop AI (Santa Clara), Ayar Labs (San Jose), and Mind Robotics (Palo Alto) each raised half a billion dollars in March, while SiFive (Santa Clara) and Rhoda AI (Palo Alto) joined the mega-round club. With 18 companies raising capital across AI, semiconductors, and robotics in the past month, hiring remains robust—seven firms are actively expanding headcount despite broader market caution.
